[[File:Keris partisan of the sun detail.png|left|150px]]
The '''keris partisan of the sun''' is a one-handed spear requiring 80 [[Attack]] to equip. It is made by attaching the [[jewel of the sun]] to the [[keris partisan]], granting it a [[Keris partisan of the sun#Special attack|special attack]] and two unique [[passive effect]]s that only apply within the [[Tombs of Amascut]] [[raid]]:

# providing a 25% increase to accuracy for targets with less than 25% health
# healing the player for 12 [[Hitpoints]] upon killing a target at the cost of 5 [[prayer points]]; this effect can overheal players up to 12 Hitpoints above their base Hitpoints level

The keris partisan of the sun retains the effects of the keris partisan, dealing 33% bonus damage against all [[kalphite (attribute)|kalphite]]s and [[scabarites]], alongside a 1/51 chance of puncturing a hole in their exoskeleton, dealing triple damage. When this special effect occurs, the chatbox will display the message: {{mes|You slip your weapon through a gap in the creature's chitin, landing a vicious blow.}}

As with the keris partisan, weapon poisons cannot be applied to the partisan.

==Special attack==
[[File:Tumeken's Light.gif|thumb|250px|A player performing the Keris partisan of the sun's special attack, ''Tumeken's Light''.]]
The keris partisan of the sun has a [[special attacks|special attack]], ''Tumeken's Light'', which consumes 50 [[prayer points]] in addition to 75% of the player's special attack energy.

The special attack will fully heal the player to their maximum health and overheal players up to 20% of their base Hitpoints level. It will also cure [[poison]], and venom, as well as restore the player's [[run energy]] and any drained [[stats]].

==Changes==
{{Subject changes header}}
{{Subject changes
|date = 20 March 2024
|update = Varlamore: Part One
|change = Players may no longer attach jewels obtained from the [[Tombs of Amascut]] to a wielded keris partisan if they do not have level 80 Attack.
}}
{{Subject changes
|date = 21 September 2022
|update = Tombs of Amascut Changes & Beta Tweaks
|change = When players deal a critical hit to kalphites and scabarites with the keris partisan, the chat message was updated from "''You slip your weapon through a chink in the creature's chitin, landing a vicious blow.''" to "''You slip your weapon through a gap in the creature's chitin, landing a vicious blow.''"
}}
{{Subject changes footer}}

==Trivia==
* Originally, the keris partisan of the sun did not have a special attack, and had a different passive effect, which applied a debuff to attacked NPCs and caused them to take higher damage for a sustained period of time.
